prompt: Generate an elegant editorial-style digital illustration of a woman resting under an open sky, her dark hair loosely framing her face as if touched by a warm breeze. Her eyes are closed and her lips slightly parted, giving a reflective, intimate mood. She wears a dark blue off-shoulder top. Surround her with oversized cloud formations, bright sky blues, and subtle utility wires in the distance. Use smooth painterly textures, tasteful color blocking, modern poster-like composition, and a refined fashion-illustration sensibility.
